title: haworthiopsis × subrigida
intro: Haworthiopsis × subrigida, a hybrid succulent plant, is a cross between Haworthia truncata and Haworthia limifolia. This plant is known for its unique, fleshy leaves with white, woolly hair and a distinctive, truncate shape. Haworthiopsis × subrigida has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to have medicinal benefits in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The plant's medicinal properties can be extracted through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its health benefits.
